title: ъуъ Craft
description: If you love meme ъуъ, then this mod is for you. The mod adds a meme cat ъуъ.
body:
# ъуъ cat
This cat can't spawn on its own, nothing falls out of it,this mob don't have functions, it only spawns from the spawn egg
Which is made from 7 blocks of black wool in the shape of the letter H and a glowstone on top
